title: FALKEN'S MAZE
summary: Text maze crawl through a 12x12 labyrinth with fog-of-war MAP. Interpretation: the film only names the game.
notes: NEW takes no arguments on the WOPR/1 wire, so every game deals the same seed-1983 maze. MOVE with INPUT omitted = engine walks one shortest-path step (self-play). No losing condition; reaching the exit is WIN with the move count.
author: core
